parsed.clarification_question: To scope “Check this,” which focus should I apply? Choose one: (A) Argument/thesis and logic check (R1.1–R1.2), (B) Writing polish only—grammar, clarity, concision (R1.6), (C) Novelty/positioning vs prior safe RL/constrained RL work (R1.4, R1.7), (D) Section-level restructuring of this passage (R1.5), or (E) A comprehensive pass across all of the above.

rationale.RX.1: Given the vague request and strong claims, the check must clearly state assumptions and limits of what can be verified from the excerpt alone.
rationale.RX.2: Feedback should avoid endorsing claims or generalizations beyond what the provided passage supports and the chosen scope permits.
rationale.RX.3: Once a focus is selected, the review must stay within that scope and not expand into execution, experiments, or unrelated edits.
rationale.RX.4: Because the text concerns safety-critical deployment, guidance should avoid encouraging unsafe interpretations or practices.
rationale.RX.5: Any judgments should be traceable to specific sentences in the excerpt and explicitly distinguish text-based inference from assumption.
